sqlMap.select: WITH bas_list AS ( SELECT DISTINCT base_no AS base_no FROM pokedex WHERE no IN ( SELECT no FROM pogo5f UNION ALL SELECT no FROM pogo5s UNION ALL SELECT no FROM pogo5t ) ), f_dup AS ( SELECT base_no , GROUP_CONCAT(form_no ORDER BY form_no SEPARATOR ',') AS dup FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT d.base_no AS base_no , p.form_no FROM pogo5f p JOIN pokedex d ON d.no = p.no GROUP BY d.base_no, p.no, p.form_no HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 ) t GROUP BY base_no ), s_dup AS ( SELECT base_no , GROUP_CONCAT(form_no ORDER BY form_no SEPARATOR ',') AS dup FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT d.base_no AS base_no , p.form_no FROM pogo5s p JOIN pokedex d ON d.no = p.no GROUP BY d.base_no, p.no, p.form_no HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 ) t GROUP BY base_no ), t_dup AS ( SELECT base_no , GROUP_CONCAT(form_no ORDER BY form_no SEPARATOR ',') AS dup FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT d.base_no AS base_no, p.form_no FROM pogo5t p JOIN pokedex d ON d.no = p.no GROUP BY d.base_no, p.no, p.form_no HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 ) t GROUP BY base_no ), evo_ids AS ( SELECT pk.base_no AS base_no , MAX(CASE WHEN pk.evl = 0 THEN pk.no END) AS id0 , MAX(CASE WHEN pk.evl = 1 THEN pk.no END) AS id1 , MAX(CASE WHEN pk.evl = 2 THEN pk.no END) AS id2 FROM pokedex pk JOIN bas_list bl ON pk.base_no = bl.base_no GROUP BY pk.base_no ), f_evo1_raw AS ( SELECT pk.base_no AS base_no , p.gndr AS gen , GROUP_CONCAT(p.no * 100 + p.form_no ORDER BY p.form_no + pk.beta, p.no ASC SEPARATOR ',') AS id_ord , GROUP_CONCAT(p.no * 100 + p.form_no ORDER BY p.form_no + pk.beta, p.srl_no DESC SEPARATOR ',') AS seq_ord FROM pogo5f p JOIN pokedex pk ON pk.no = p.no JOIN evo_ids ei ON pk.base_no = ei.base_no AND pk.no = CASE pk.evl WHEN 0 THEN ei.id0 WHEN 1 THEN ei.id1 WHEN 2 THEN ei.id2 END WHERE p.iv = 100 GROUP BY pk.base_no, p.gndr ), f_evo2_raw AS ( SELECT pk.base_no AS base_no , p.gndr AS gen , pk.evl , GROUP_CONCAT(p.no * 100 + p.form_no ORDER BY p.form_no + pk.beta, p.no DESC SEPARATOR ',') AS id_ord , GROUP_CONCAT(p.no * 100 + p.form_no ORDER BY p.form_no + pk.beta, p.srl_no DESC SEPARATOR ',') AS seq_ord FROM pogo5f p JOIN pokedex pk ON pk.no = p.no JOIN bas_list ON pk.base_no = bas_list.base_no WHERE p.iv = 100 GROUP BY pk.base_no, p.gndr, pk.evl ), f_evo2 AS ( SELECT base_no , gen , MAX(CASE WHEN id_ord <> seq_ord THEN '2' ELSE '' END) AS flag FROM f_evo2_raw GROUP BY base_no, gen ), f_evo_per_gender AS ( SELECT COALESCE(e1.base_no, e2.base_no) AS base_no , COALESCE(e1.gen, e2.gen) AS gen , CONCAT(CASE WHEN e1.id_ord <> e1.seq_ord THEN '1' ELSE '' END, IFNULL(e2.flag, '')) AS gender_flag FROM f_evo1_raw e1 LEFT JOIN f_evo2 e2 ON e1.base_no = e2.base_no AND e1.gen = e2.gen UNION ALL SELECT e2.base_no AS base_no , e2.gen AS gen , IFNULL(e2.flag, '') AS gender_flag FROM f_evo1_raw e1 RIGHT JOIN f_evo2 e2 ON e1.base_no = e2.base_no AND e1.gen = e2.gen WHERE e1.base_no IS NULL ), f_evo AS ( SELECT base_no , CONCAT(IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN gen = 'm' THEN gender_flag END), ''), ',', IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN gen = 'f' THEN gender_flag END), ''), ',', IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN gen = 'g' THEN gender_flag END), ''), ',') AS evo FROM f_evo_per_gender GROUP BY base_no ), s_evo1_raw AS ( SELECT pk.base_no AS base_no , p.gndr AS gen , GROUP_CONCAT(p.no * 100 + p.form_no ORDER BY p.form_no + pk.beta, p.no ASC SEPARATOR ',') AS id_ord , GROUP_CONCAT(p.no * 100 + p.form_no ORDER BY p.form_no + pk.beta, p.srl_no DESC SEPARATOR ',') AS seq_ord FROM pogo5s p JOIN pokedex pk ON pk.no = p.no JOIN evo_ids ei ON pk.base_no = ei.base_no AND pk.no = CASE pk.evl WHEN 0 THEN ei.id0 WHEN 1 THEN ei.id1 WHEN 2 THEN ei.id2 END WHERE p.iv = 100 GROUP BY pk.base_no, p.gndr ), s_evo2_raw AS ( SELECT pk.base_no AS base_no , p.gndr AS gen , pk.evl , GROUP_CONCAT(p.no * 100 + p.form_no ORDER BY p.form_no + pk.beta, p.no DESC SEPARATOR ',') AS id_ord , GROUP_CONCAT(p.no * 100 + p.form_no ORDER BY p.form_no + pk.beta, p.srl_no DESC SEPARATOR ',') AS seq_ord FROM pogo5s p JOIN pokedex pk ON pk.no = p.no JOIN bas_list ON pk.base_no = bas_list.base_no WHERE p.iv = 100 GROUP BY pk.base_no, p.gndr, pk.evl ), s_evo2 AS ( SELECT base_no , gen , MAX(CASE WHEN id_ord <> seq_ord THEN '2' ELSE '' END) AS flag FROM s_evo2_raw GROUP BY base_no, gen ), s_evo_per_gender AS ( SELECT COALESCE(e1.base_no, e2.base_no) AS base_no , COALESCE(e1.gen, e2.gen) AS gen , CONCAT(CASE WHEN e1.id_ord <> e1.seq_ord THEN '1' ELSE '' END, IFNULL(e2.flag, '')) AS gender_flag FROM s_evo1_raw e1 LEFT JOIN s_evo2 e2 ON e1.base_no = e2.base_no AND e1.gen = e2.gen UNION ALL SELECT e2.base_no AS base_no , e2.gen AS gen , IFNULL(e2.flag, '') AS gender_flag FROM s_evo1_raw e1 RIGHT JOIN s_evo2 e2 ON e1.base_no = e2.base_no AND e1.gen = e2.gen WHERE e1.base_no IS NULL ), s_evo AS ( SELECT base_no , CONCAT(IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN gen = 'm' THEN gender_flag END), ''), ',', IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN gen = 'f' THEN gender_flag END), ''), ',', IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN gen = 'g' THEN gender_flag END), ''), ',') AS evo FROM s_evo_per_gender GROUP BY base_no ), t_evo1_raw AS ( SELECT pk.base_no AS base_no , p.gndr AS gen , GROUP_CONCAT(p.no * 100 + p.form_no ORDER BY p.form_no + pk.beta, p.no ASC SEPARATOR ',') AS id_ord , GROUP_CONCAT(p.no * 100 + p.form_no ORDER BY p.form_no + pk.beta, p.srl_no DESC SEPARATOR ',') AS seq_ord FROM pogo5t p JOIN pokedex pk ON pk.no = p.no JOIN evo_ids ei ON pk.base_no = ei.base_no AND pk.no = CASE pk.evl WHEN 0 THEN ei.id0 WHEN 1 THEN ei.id1 WHEN 2 THEN ei.id2 END WHERE p.iv = 100 GROUP BY pk.base_no, p.gndr ), t_evo2_raw AS ( SELECT pk.base_no AS base_no , p.gndr AS gen , pk.evl , GROUP_CONCAT(p.no * 100 + p.form_no ORDER BY p.form_no + pk.beta, p.no DESC SEPARATOR ',') AS id_ord , GROUP_CONCAT(p.no * 100 + p.form_no ORDER BY p.form_no + pk.beta, p.srl_no DESC SEPARATOR ',') AS seq_ord FROM pogo5t p JOIN pokedex pk ON pk.no = p.no JOIN bas_list ON pk.base_no = bas_list.base_no WHERE p.iv = 100 GROUP BY pk.base_no, p.gndr, pk.evl ), t_evo2 AS ( SELECT base_no , gen , MAX(CASE WHEN id_ord <> seq_ord THEN '2' ELSE '' END) AS flag FROM t_evo2_raw GROUP BY base_no, gen ), t_evo_per_gender AS ( SELECT COALESCE(e1.base_no, e2.base_no) AS base_no , COALESCE(e1.gen, e2.gen) AS gen , CONCAT(CASE WHEN e1.id_ord <> e1.seq_ord THEN '1' ELSE '' END, IFNULL(e2.flag, '')) AS gender_flag FROM t_evo1_raw e1 LEFT JOIN t_evo2 e2 ON e1.base_no = e2.base_no AND e1.gen = e2.gen UNION ALL SELECT e2.base_no AS base_no , e2.gen AS gen , IFNULL(e2.flag, '') AS gender_flag FROM t_evo1_raw e1 RIGHT JOIN t_evo2 e2 ON e1.base_no = e2.base_no AND e1.gen = e2.gen WHERE e1.base_no IS NULL ), t_evo AS ( SELECT base_no , CONCAT(IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN gen = 'm' THEN gender_flag END), ''), ',', IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN gen = 'f' THEN gender_flag END), ''), ',', IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN gen = 'g' THEN gender_flag END), ''), ',') AS evo FROM t_evo_per_gender GROUP BY base_no ) SELECT bl.base_no "basId" , pk.dv "div" , pk.name "name" , fd.dup "pogo5fDup" , TRIM(TRAILING ',' FROM fe.evo) "pogo5fEvo" , sd.dup "pogo5sDup" , TRIM(TRAILING ',' FROM se.evo) "pogo5sEvo" , td.dup "pogo5tDup" , TRIM(TRAILING ',' FROM te.evo) "pogo5tEvo" FROM bas_list bl JOIN pokedex pk ON pk.no = bl.base_no LEFT JOIN f_dup fd ON fd.base_no = bl.base_no LEFT JOIN f_evo fe ON fe.base_no = bl.base_no LEFT JOIN s_dup sd ON sd.base_no = bl.base_no LEFT JOIN s_evo se ON se.base_no = bl.base_no LEFT JOIN t_dup td ON td.base_no = bl.base_no LEFT JOIN t_evo te ON te.base_no = bl.base_no WHERE fd.base_no IS NOT NULL OR NULLIF(TRIM(TRAILING ',' FROM fe.evo), '') IS NOT NULL OR sd.base_no IS NOT NULL OR NULLIF(TRIM(TRAILING ',' FROM se.evo), '') IS NOT NULL OR td.base_no IS NOT NULL OR NULLIF(TRIM(TRAILING ',' FROM te.evo), '') IS NOT NULL ORDER BY pk.name
